title: NYC just had its best tech quarter since 2021 #nyctech #startup
spoken_script: New York City venture capital hit 4.2 billion dollars in Q1 2026. The rebound is happening at the intersection of finance, media, and AI. Companies that need Wall Street relationships, real media access, and fashion industry connections. You literally cannot build these from Silicon Valley. The Cornell Tech campus on Roosevelt Island graduated its largest class ever. Most of them stayed in New York. The ecosystem flywheel is finally turning. Full analysis at nyspotlightreport.com.
